blended.narrative: Timberline is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,190 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 40.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 54".
